prompt: Create an ultra-detailed vertical fantasy portrait of Yuna, a young woman styled as an ornate royal sorceress or shrine maiden, shown from the chest up in a dark blue and gold baroque floral setting. She has long glossy black hair with loose wet-looking strands, elaborate blue flower hair ornaments, dangling gold chains, lapis-blue beads, and tassels framing her head. Her face is completely hidden by a centered opaque square block in a muted brown skin-tone color, covering the facial features from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, neck, hands, costume, and accessories visible. She wears a luxurious pale silver-white kimono robe embroidered with metallic gold filigree and deep cobalt-blue floral appliqués, with layered fabric folds and a refined ceremonial collar. In her left hand she holds a tall dark navy staff or scepter with polished gold bands, topped by an intricate circular gold astrolabe-like ornament with concentric rings, filigree, tiny blue gemstones, and a hanging blue tassel. Surround her with dense decorative elements: blue and crimson flowers, gilded curling vines, ornate scrollwork, jewel-like beads, and blurred floral ornaments in the foreground and background. Use deep sapphire blue, antique gold, silver white, crimson accents, dramatic cinematic lighting, warm highlights on metal, shallow depth of field, hyperrealistic texture, high-fashion fantasy photography, extremely crisp embroidery and jewelry details, dark moody background, vertical 9:16 composition, premium gpt-image-2 detail level.
